_doc: Documented FREE-tier rate limits per provider, transcribed from docs/providers.md. Limits change — update this file, not code. Units are explicit keys (requests_per_minute, requests_per_day, tokens_per_minute, tokens_per_day, ...). Omitted key = unknown/not published. `per_model` overrides the provider defaults for specific models. Approximate values are flagged in `notes`.

groq.notes: TPD scales with model size; ~100K TPD for 70B-class. Forever free, no CC.

openrouter.notes: Free tier: 50 req/day. With >=$10 deposit: 1000 req/day.

pollinations.notes: sk_ (secret) key: unlimited. pk_ (publishable): 1 pollen/hr/IP. No key needed at all.

ollama.notes: Self-hosted: unlimited. Cloud Free: 1 concurrent request.

arli.notes: Qwen-3.5-27B-Derestricted: 12K ctx, 1 concurrent. Other models: 5 trial requests / 2 days.

gemini-3.5-flash.notes: CRITICAL: only 20 requests/day. Confirmed by live 429s. Other Flash models get 1500 RPD.

gemini.notes: Permanent free, no CC. Defaults shown are gemini-2.5-flash. Per-model overrides above.

zai.notes: glm-4.5-flash, glm-4.7-flash, glm-4.6v-flash permanently free; no explicit RPM limit (fair use).

mistral.notes: Experiment mode: all models, 2 RPM, ~1B tokens/month.

cohere.notes: Trial: 5 RPM, 100K calls/month. Production tier: 500 RPM.

huggingface.notes: Serverless: ~few hundred requests/hour, models <10GB. Cold starts 10-30s. PRO $9/mo raises limits.

cloudflare.notes: 10,000 Neurons/day (Cloudflare's unit; ~20-60 requests for a 70B model). Also covers embeddings/image/TTS/STT.

sambanova.notes: $5 credits (3 months) + ongoing 20 RPM / 200K TPD. Dev tier: 240 RPM (70B).

ngc.notes: ~40 RPM on Developer Program; varies per model. 100+ models.

moonshot.notes: Free ~3 RPM. Paid: 60 RPM. Also free via Cloudflare/OpenRouter.

stepfun.notes: V0 tier (no payment): 10 RPM / 5M TPM / 5 concurrent. V1 ($15): 1000 RPM.

internlm.notes: V0 tier (no payment): identical ladder to StepFun. V1 ($15): 1000 RPM.

minimax.notes: Trial credits only; no recurring free tier. M3 open-weight imminent.

ai21.notes: Trial credits only. Contact sales for rate limits.

openai.notes: $5 credits (3 months). Free: 3 RPM / 200 RPD. Tier 1 ($5 top-up): 500 RPM. GPT-5+ needs paid tier.

anthropic.notes: Tier 1 ($5): 50 RPM; varies by model. Prompt caching doesn't count toward limits. ~$5 signup credits, no recurring free.

tu.notes: Self-hosted (Aqueduct relay -> vLLM). No published per-user quota; the adaptive AIMD limiter (uniinfer/ratelimit.py) self-tunes per (provider, model) from observed 429s.

zai-code.notes: Coding endpoint from Zhipu AI; inherits Z.AI fair-use. See zai.

opencode.notes: OpenCode/Zen model router (OpenAI-compatible at opencode.ai/zen/v1). Free models: deepseek-v4-flash-free, big-pickle, mimo-v2.5-free, hy3-free, nemotron-3-ultra-free, north-mini-code-free. Many are reasoning models — use a generous max_tokens or reasoning_effort='none'. Claude models use the Anthropic-messages API (not this OpenAI provider).
